blocks.text: Given n vertical lines, where the i-th line is x = ai , and also m horizontal lines, where the i-th line is y = bi , it costs ti units of time to move 1 unit of distance along the i-th vertical line, and it costs t0 units of time to move 1 unit of distance along any horizontal line. Let f (i, j) be the minimum time needed to get from (0, 0) to (ai , bj ) by moving only along the vertical and horizontal lines. You need to answer q queries, where each query is represented as four integers l, r, d, and u, and you need to calculate
u r X X f (i, j) i=lⱼ=d
Since the answers may be large, output them modulo 998244353.

There are multiple test cases. The first line of the input contains an integer T (1 ≤ T ≤ 10⁴ ), indicating the number of test cases. For each test case: The first line contains three integers n, m, and q (1 ≤ n, m, q ≤ 2 × 10⁵ ), indicating the numbers of vertical lines, horizontal lines, and queries. The second line contains n integers a1 , a2 , . . . , an (0 = a1 < a2 < · · · < an ≤ 10⁹ ), indicating the x-coordinates of the vertical lines. The third line contains m integers b1 , b2 , . . . , bm (0 = b1 < b2 < · · · < bm ≤ 10⁹ ), indicating the y- coordinates of the horizontal lines. The fourth line contains n integers t1 , t2 , . . . , tn (1 ≤ ti ≤ 10⁹ ), where ti indicates the time needed to move 1 unit of distance along the i-th vertical line. The fifth line contains one integer t0 (1 ≤ t0 ≤ 10⁹ ), indicating the time needed to move 1 unit of distance along any horizontal line. For the following q lines, the i-th line contains four integers li , ri , di , and ui (1 ≤ li ≤ ri ≤ n, 1 ≤ di ≤ ui ≤ m), indicating the i-th query. It is guaranteed that the sum of n, the sum of m, and the sum of q over all test cases do not exceed 2 × 10⁵ .
For each test case, output one line containing q integers, where the i-th integer is the answer to the i-th query modulo 998244353.

给定 n 条竖线，其中第 i 条为 x = aᵢ，另外给定 m 条横线，其中第 i 条为 y = bᵢ。沿着第 i 条竖线行进1 单位距离需要 tᵢ 的时间，沿着任意一条横线行进 1 单位距离需要 t 0 的时间。令 f(i,j) 表示仅沿竖线和横线行进，从 (0,0) 移动到 (aᵢ ,bⱼ ) 所需的最短时间。您需要回答 q 次询问，每次询问给定四个整数 l，r，d，u，您需要计算∑r ∑u f(i,j) i=lⱼ=d由于答案可能很大，请将答案对 998244353 取模后输出。

有多组测试数据。第一行输入一个整数 T（1 ≤ T ≤ 10⁴），表示测试数据组数。对于每组测试数据：第一行输入三个整数 n，m，q（1 ≤ n,m,q ≤ 2 × 10⁵），表示竖线数量、横线数量和询问次数。第二行输入 n 个整数 a 1 ,a 2 ,...,a n（0 = a 1 < a 2 < ··· < a n ≤ 10⁹），表示每条竖线的 x 坐标。第三行输入 m 个整数 b 1 ,b 2 ,...,b m（0 = b 1 < b 2 < ··· < b m ≤ 10⁹），表示每条横线的 y 坐标。第四行输入 n 个整数 t 1 ,t 2 ,...,t n（1 ≤ tᵢ ≤ 10⁹），其中 tᵢ 表示沿着第 i 条竖线行进 1 单位距离需要的时间。第五行输入一个整数 t 0（1 ≤ t 0 ≤ 10⁹），表示沿着每条横线行进 1 单位距离需要的时间。接下来 q 行，第 i 行包含四个整数 lᵢ，rᵢ，dᵢ，uᵢ（1 ≤ lᵢ ≤ rᵢ ≤ n，1 ≤ dᵢ ≤ uᵢ ≤ m），表示第 i 次询问。保证所有测试数据中 n 的总和、m 的总和、以及 q 的总和均不超过 2 × 10⁵。
每组测试数据输出一行，包含 q 个整数，其中第 i 个整数表示第 i 次询问的答案对 998244353 取模后的结果。
